mapper.sql: id, todo_id, title, is_completed, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.todo_id, s.title, s.is_completed, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM todo_subtask s INNER JOIN todo_item t ON t.id = s.todo_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.created_at ASC
SELECT FROM todo_subtask WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_subtask (todo_id, title, is_completed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{todoId}, #{title}, #{isCompleted}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM todo_subtask WHERE id = #{id} AND todo_id = #{todoId}
